wafv2.webacl.captchaconfig.CfnAbout: Specifies how AWS WAF should handle `CAPTCHA` evaluations for rules that don't have their own `CaptchaConfig` settings. If you don't specify this, AWS WAF uses its default settings for `CaptchaConfig`.

wafv2.webacl.captchaconfig.ImmunityTimeP.Description: Determines how long a `CAPTCHA` timestamp in the token remains valid after the client successfully solves a `CAPTCHA` puzzle.
